---
name: Workflow request
about: Propose a reviewable research, document, or draft-package workflow
title: "workflow: "
labels: workflow
---

## User result

What should a user have when the workflow finishes?

## Explicit inputs

List the public URLs, local file types, or existing task artifacts it should accept. Do not include secrets, private page captures, or credentials.

## Proposed outputs

Describe the Markdown, dataset, report, draft package, or other task-local artifacts.

## Approval and risk boundary

Which steps read files, access the network, write artifacts, call a model, save a draft, or publish? What must remain a separate approval?

## Offline reproduction

Provide a self-authored fixture or describe how the behavior can be tested without a third-party website or a login.
